features: Soft & gentle: Johnson's Baby Cotton Buds are made of 100% pure cotton tips and paper sticks, being gentle enough for use in delicate areas around the eyes and the outer ear
Newborn essentials: The cotton swabs can be used as cotton ear buds and also to gently clean and dry difficult-to-reach places such as between baby's fingers, toes, and other skin creases
Naturally absorbent: With 100% pure cotton tips and paper sticks, the Baby Cotton Buds are designed for gentle use on delicate skin and are great for applying cream to blemishes and removing makeup
Plastic-free packaging: The cotton ear buds come in recyclable paper-based packaging made from 90% recycled materials, while the remaining 10% comes from well-managed FSC certified forests
Product details: Johnson's Baby Cotton Buds(1 x Pack of 200) soft and gentle ear cotton buds made of pure cotton and paper sticks, plastic-free cotton buds, baby essentials for newborn care
description: Product Description Johnson's Baby Cotton Buds(1 x Pack of 200) - Best for Baby, Best for You At Johnson's, we only choose high-quality components that meet our Best for Baby Standards, and Johnson's Baby Cotton Buds are no exception. Made with 100% pure cotton tips and paper sticks, these cotton swabs are naturally-absorbant and completely plastic-free, making them soft and gentle enough for the whole family, especially for baby's delicate skin. They are designed to gently clean and dry between baby's fingers, toes, and around the eyes, nose, or outer ear. The cotton ear buds can also be used to apply cream to blemishes or makeup and for removing it around the eyes. Its recyclable paper-based packaging is made from 90% recycled materials, while the other 10% is from well-managed FSC® certified forests. By removing the plastic from our packaging, we will save about 270 tonnes of plastic from landfills each year, equivalent to about 30 million plastic bags. If we tied those bags together, the length would be more than the earth’s diameter!* Application instructions: Gently cleanse and dry between baby’s fingers, toes and around the eyes, nose or outer ear. It can also be used to apply cream to blemishes. Ideal for applying and removing make-up and cleaning around eyes and outer ear. CAUTION: Do not insert into the ear canal or nose. If using on ears, use gently to remove dirt from the outer surface of the ear only. Improper use can cause injury. If problems occur, consult a physician. Keep out of reach of children. Product Benefits at A Glance Daily use baby cotton buds Soft & gentle for delicate skin Made of 100% pure cotton & paper sticks Can be used to apply makeup and cream Plastic-free recyclable packaging 1 x Pack of 200 buds *Based on 2019 sales volume in Europe, Middle East & Africa, and a 10g plastic bag Ingredients 100% pure cotton Directions Best for Baby. Best for You. Safety Warning Use with care near eyes and ears Box Contains Pack of 1. Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Johnson & Johnson Ltd. 50-100 Holmers Farm Way High Wycombe HP12 4EG UK IE: Johnson & Johnson GmbH Platz 2. D-41470 Neuss Germany See more
